description:
Create a 3D model of a conical roof turret and install solar panels on its south-facing facets using the Skelion plugin. 

Starting State: SketchUp Make 2017 is open with a blank scene.

Instructions:
1. Model a cone with a base radius of 3.0 meters and a height of 5.0 meters, centered near the origin.
2. Enable 'View > Hidden Geometry' to reveal the individual flat facets of the cone.
3. Select ONLY the south-facing facets of the cone (faces pointing generally toward the negative Green axis).
4. Use the Skelion plugin to install solar panels (flush mount) onto these selected south-facing facets.
5. Save the completed model to: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\turret_solar.skp
